html_body:
Dear Carlos,

Thank you for using SwissDevJobs.

Your application for the role Software Engineer - ERP Integrations at BLP Digital AG has been sent directly to the company.

Motivation letter:

I am applying for the Software Engineer ERP Integrations role at BLP Digital. I hold a Swiss Work Permit B, relocated to Switzerland in April 2025, and am available immediately. I bring hands-on ERP integration experience and a track record of building automated data pipelines that connect disparate systems. I built a production ETL pipeline (github.com/carlosedbaptista/job-hunt-pipeline) that integrates the Claude and Kimi LLM API for intelligent job-fit scoring, runs on GitHub Actions CI/CD, and delivers ranked email digests. The pipeline performs end-to-end automation: ingesting data from Adzuna API and Gmail IMAP, deduplicating across sources, evaluating fit via structured LLM prompts, and producing actionable outputs. This mirrors the autonomous agent architecture LLM reasoning connected to external tools and APIs that the internship explores. At QUOD, I automated Oracle NetSuite ERP workflows using JavaScript and Node.js, reducing manual work by 40%. At netzdenker.com, I use Python and JavaScript daily to build data-driven tools and AIassisted workflows. My experience shipping independent projects positions me to contribute to your AI agents and internal platforms from day one. I use Claude and Kimi daily as coding agents to ship end-to-end solutions. While I continue building my knowledge of MCP servers, Argo Workflows, and advanced CI/CD tooling, my foundation in LLM API integration, workflow automation, and autonomous pipeline architecture positions me to contribute immediately to your Jira-to-pull-request research. I am fluent in English (C1 Advanced), my German is A2 and improving. I have attached my CV and look forward to discussing how I can contribute.

You should be contacted directly by them in the next few days.

If you don't receive an answer within a week or two, please send us an email to support@swissdevjobs.ch.

Good luck in the interview process!

If you want to increase your chances of finding an interesting job: create a Talent Profile.

Best regards,
SwissDevJobs Team
